name: Aushang — POC 3 · Human Confirm → Route → Publish (decides)

nodes.name: Draft + Admin Decision
nodes.notes: The AI SUGGESTED 'info'; the admin CORRECTED it to 'event_notice' (this is the 'tap to correct' in the MVP review screen). Routing will read the CONFIRMED value, not the suggestion. Set admin_pressed_publish=false to see publishing blocked.

nodes.name: Route by CONFIRMED type (no AI)
nodes.notes: The heart of POC 3: routing uses the admin-CONFIRMED type (event_notice), NOT the AI's suggestion (info). And it only publishes if the admin pressed publish. This is 'deterministic code & a human decide'.

nodes.name: Confirmed + Published?
nodes.notes: TRUE = a human confirmed a real type AND pressed publish -> route to its destinations (here: events + ICS + Termine, plus the Pinnwand). FALSE = unconfirmed or not published -> stays a draft, invisible to members.

nodes.name: PUBLISH → feed/calendar/ICS
nodes.notes: In the MVP: the publish_post RPC flips status to 'published', creates calendar events, adds them to subscribed ICS feeds, and fans out the email/push digest. Members now see it.

nodes.name: STAYS DRAFT (invisible to members)
nodes.notes: No confirmation or no publish press -> the post is never member-visible. The default path is SAFE: nothing leaks to members without a human.
